title: Nursery Rhyme. XV. Historical
content:
Please to remember
        The fifth of November,
            Gunpowder treason and plot;
        I know no reason
        Why gunpowder treason
            Should ever be forgot.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. XV. Historical"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
